_meta.purpose: Positive, dignified protective framing for each defense — used as anchor text for AI image generation (talisman card). Keys mirror twr/data/defenses.ts exactly.
_meta.tone: gentle, protective, dignified, quiet — never clinical, never deficit-framed

Acting Out.framing_en: letting truth move through the body when language is not yet ready
Acting Out.image_seed: a single footprint left on warm sand, intent without explanation

Affiliation.framing_en: leaning toward others to bear what is heavy
Affiliation.image_seed: two warm hands holding the same small lantern

Altruism.framing_en: turning private pain into care for others
Altruism.image_seed: a kettle pouring tea into another's cup, the kettle still half full

Anticipation.framing_en: rehearsing tomorrow gently to soften its arrival
Anticipation.image_seed: an open umbrella set down on a chair before the rain

Apathetic Withdrawal.framing_en: saving small flame by stepping back from the wind
Apathetic Withdrawal.image_seed: a hand cupped softly around a candle's flame

Autistic Fantasy.framing_en: building an inner shelter when the outside is too loud
Autistic Fantasy.image_seed: a paper boat folded carefully on a windowsill

Denial.framing_en: preserving the soft skin of what cannot yet be known
Denial.image_seed: a closed envelope resting unopened on a clean table

Devaluation.framing_en: letting go of what cost too much to keep holding
Devaluation.image_seed: a key set down at the edge of a wide flat stone

Displacement.framing_en: moving heat to a place where it can land safely
Displacement.image_seed: a warm cup placed on a stone trivet, away from paper

Dissociation.framing_en: stepping outside the body to survive an unbearable moment
Dissociation.image_seed: a long shadow gently detached from its sleeping figure

Help-Rejecting Complaining.framing_en: keeping pain visible while still learning to trust hands
Help-Rejecting Complaining.image_seed: a bandage left loose on the table beside the wound

Humor.image_seed: a feather balanced on a smooth grey stone

Idealization.framing_en: holding goodness as a steady anchor in the storm
Idealization.image_seed: a small north star kept in a jar of dark water

Intellectualization.framing_en: thinking as a way to feel from a safe distance
Intellectualization.image_seed: a folded map opened on a calm wooden floor

Isolation of Affect.framing_en: creating quiet space between feeling and action
Isolation of Affect.image_seed: a single tea bowl in a wide, empty stone tray

Omnipotence.framing_en: claiming agency when smallness feels unbearable
Omnipotence.image_seed: a small seed held firmly in an open palm, sun on the wrist

Passive Aggression.framing_en: speaking sideways when speaking straight is unsafe
Passive Aggression.image_seed: a folded note slid quietly under a door

Projection.framing_en: recognizing in others what is not yet held alone
Projection.image_seed: a mirror leaned against a wall, reflecting only soft light

Projective Identification.framing_en: sharing inner weather until it becomes mutually felt
Projective Identification.image_seed: two cups holding the same drifting steam

Rationalization.framing_en: building a path of reason when feeling has no path
Rationalization.image_seed: stepping stones laid carefully across a still pond

Reaction Formation.framing_en: turning hard feelings into careful tending of their opposite
Reaction Formation.image_seed: a small plant watered with steady hands at dawn

Repression.framing_en: carrying what cannot yet be lifted into language
Repression.image_seed: a closed wooden box resting under a soft cloth

Self-Assertion.framing_en: claiming one's own ground without taking another's
Self-Assertion.image_seed: a single footprint pressed clearly into wet sand

Self-Observation.framing_en: turning attention inward as a form of tending
Self-Observation.image_seed: a still pool of water held in a stone basin

Splitting.framing_en: keeping good and difficult apart so something can stay whole
Splitting.image_seed: two folded cloths set on opposite ends of a long shelf

Sublimation.framing_en: transforming what hurts into something that can be given
Sublimation.image_seed: a clay bowl shaped from rough earth, fired smooth

Suppression.framing_en: choosing not now, knowing it will return when ready
Suppression.image_seed: a lantern wick lowered, waiting for evening

Undoing.framing_en: returning to a moment with gentler hands
Undoing.image_seed: a hand smoothing a creased page back open on a table
